GROUPS: Checks that group settings and membership are controlled safely.
MTCISAGUESTINVITATION: Checks that guest invitations are limited to approved users.
MTCISAGUESTUSERACCESS: Checks that guest access is restricted to approved sharing needs.
MTCISASPOSHARING: Checks that SharePoint sharing follows the approved rules.
MTCISASPOSHARINGALLOWEDDOMAIN: Checks that SharePoint sharing is limited to approved external domains.
MTCISSPOB2BINTEGRATION: Checks that SharePoint external collaboration is limited to approved partners.
MTENTITLEMENTMANAGEMENTDELETEDGROUPS: Checks that group settings and membership are controlled safely.
